utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes all six named sections. (2) financing: provides solution with terms; includes cash purchase, bridge financing with rate range, timeline, and a legal processing fee—sufficiently specified. (3) legal_services: includes service name, cost, and what’s included—meets requirement. (4) moving_services: includes service, cost, inclusions, and timeline—meets requirement. (5) setup_services: includes utilities and setup services with service, cost, and inclusions; also adds healthcare setup and contractor contact—meets requirement. (6) total_budget: provides complete cost breakdown with property cost range, service costs, detailed breakdown, total investment, budget fit, and remaining equity—meets requirement. All 6 items are present and fully specified.
